message:
feat(fcp-core): add stream-key ordering to EventEnvelope

Introduce OrderingPolicy enum (Gateway, PerKey, Unordered) and optional
stream_key/ordering fields on EventEnvelope to let connectors declare
how their sequence numbers should be interpreted by downstream consumers.

This enables per-key ordered delivery for connectors whose source systems
provide key-scoped ordering (e.g., Slack channel IDs, user IDs) while
maintaining backward compatibility via serde defaults. Gateway-scoped
total ordering and unordered/dedup-only modes are also supported.

- Add OrderingPolicy enum with serde rename_all snake_case
- Add stream_key: Option<String> and ordering: Option<OrderingPolicy>
  to EventEnvelope (both skip_serializing_if None for wire compat)
- Add with_stream_key() and with_ordering() builder methods
- Add comprehensive tests for new fields, serialization round-trips,
  builder chaining, and backward-compatible deserialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
